description: Phase 42 scan_silicon_functor_manifest: config/silicon_functor.json (R24+29 axis C manifest) must exist with required top-level keys {schema, functor_G, silicon_atoms, cross_functor_topology, silicon_tier_semiring_check}, at least 1 silicon atom, and every atom carrying {value, formula, atlas_ref} fields. Parallels P36 for invariants.json. Gate: healthy == true.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_silicon_functor_manifest.json ] && jq -r "if .healthy == true then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_silicon_functor_manifest.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
